services.title: Website design & development

services.title: Branding & identity
services.description: Logos, colors, and a look that makes you memorable — so you stand out from the shop down the street.

services.title: Care & analytics
services.description: We keep your site fast, secure, and improving — with plain-English reports on what's actually working.

reviews.text: Our old site looked like it was from 2009. AlexMedia gave us something we're genuinely proud to share — and the phone hasn't stopped ringing since.
reviews.name: Jenna Morales

reviews.text: They actually understood my business, not just the website. Bookings are way up and I finally show up when people search nearby.
reviews.name: Ryan Sharp

reviews.text: Fast, friendly, and no confusing tech-speak. The monthly reports are so clear I always know exactly where my marketing money goes.
reviews.name: Tara Kelly

cases.title: Brewhouse Café
cases.description: The weekend lines were great for vibes, terrible for revenue. We built a warm, mouth-watering site with built-in pre-ordering, then optimized it to show up first for "coffee near me."

cases.title: Sharp & Co. Barbers
cases.description: A booking-first redesign made it effortless to grab the next chair, while a tightly-targeted local ad campaign filled the quiet midweek slots that used to sit empty.

cases.title: GreenLeaf Day Spa
cases.description: We rebranded around calm and built a serene, mobile-friendly site that makes booking a treatment feel like the first step of the massage. It now ranks #1 and books weeks ahead.

cases.title: PipeWorks Plumbing
cases.description: Emergencies don't wait, so we built a fast, click-to-call site that loads instantly on a phone at 2am — paired with always-on ads for the urgent searches that matter most.

faqs.question: How long does a website take?
faqs.answer: Most Launch sites go live in about 2 weeks and Grow sites in 3–4 weeks. The biggest factor is how quickly we get your content and feedback — we'll keep things moving on our end.

faqs.question: Do I need to write all the content?
faqs.answer: Nope. Copywriting is included in the Grow package, and we can help with Launch too. We'll interview you, then write in your voice — you just review and approve.

faqs.question: What if I already have a website?
faqs.answer: Great — a redesign is often faster. We'll audit what's working, keep what you love, and rebuild the rest on a faster, easier-to-update foundation.

faqs.question: Will I be able to update it myself?
faqs.answer: Yes. We build on tools that are easy to edit, and we hand over a short walkthrough video. Prefer to never touch it? Our care plan handles edits for you.

faqs.question: Are there any hidden fees?
faqs.answer: None. You get a fixed quote before we start, and the only ongoing costs are ones you choose — like hosting, a care plan, or monthly marketing. We'll spell it all out up front.

faqs.question: Do you work with businesses outside my area?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We work with small businesses everywhere and run the whole process over calls, email, and screen-share — wherever you are.
